posts.author: gtv8331 (Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
we have a special request for you, which is very important for us, as we have several customers who need to use CRM, when analyzing several systems, we found that your monday system suits us best. We would like to implement it for these customers, each of them has a team of 15-20 people depending on the size of the company and will use the system for a long time, the only big obstacle for us is the language, because the customers do not have a comfortable command of English. Would it be possible for you to expand the languages ​​to Czech or Slovak, the primary language for us is Slovak as our customers are in the Slovakia region. If it is not possible to expand the languages ​​from your side, would it be possible to make a translation from our side so that the system is usable in Slovak?

Thank you in advance for your answer.

Sincerely,

Thomas
